title: hewittia malabarica
intro: Hewittia malabarica, also known as Malabar Cestrum, is a tropical plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antimalarial properties. The health benefits of Hewittia malabarica include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In traditional medicine, the plant is prepared by boiling its roots and leaves in water to create a decoction, which is then used to treat various health conditions.
